publishedAbstract: ODF upgrade fails with the following error message: ~~~ error validating existing CRs against new CRD's schema for "cephclusters.ceph.rook.io": error validating ceph.rook.io/v1, Kind=CephCluster "openshift-storage/ocs-external-storagecluster-cephcluster": updated validation is too restrictive: [[].status.ceph.capacity.bytesAvailable: Invalid value: "number": status.ceph.capacity.bytesAvailable in body must be of type integer: "number", [].status.ceph.capacity.bytesTotal: Invalid value: "number": status.ceph.capacity.bytesTotal in body must be of type integer: "number", [].status.ceph.capacity.bytesUsed: Invalid value: "number": status.ceph.capacity.bytesUsed in body must be of type integer: "number"] ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF upgrade Fails with "cephclusters.ceph.rook.io" error validating ceph.rook.io/v1
